mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls indicate expanding aggregate income and consumption, which drives corporate revenue growth and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns following month-over-month payroll increases are not positive in more than 50% of instances over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate above 4.5% signals restrictive monetary policy that elevates borrowing costs and compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of months when FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5% during any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in retail sales and stable or falling consumer prices indicate real demand expansion without inflationary cost pressures, which boosts profit margins and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising RSAFS and flat or falling CPIAUCSL fails to produce positive 60-day returns in more than 50% of triggered quarters over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment during a late-cycle expansion signals deteriorating household income and falling aggregate demand, which triggers earnings downgrades and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in more than 50% of instances when unemployment rises during late-cycle periods over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production signals rising capacity utilization and operating leverage, which drives earnings surprises and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns following month-over-month industrial production increases are not positive in more than 55% of weeks over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts signal strengthening residential investment and construction employment, which drives cyclical earnings growth and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are not positive in more than 50% of instances when housing starts increase by more than 5% over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A high federal funds rate combined with accelerating consumer prices forces the central bank to maintain restrictive policy, which raises real discount rates and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint condition of FEDFUNDS above 3.0% and CPIAUCSL rising more than 0.5% monthly coincides with positive 20-day returns in more than 50% of instances over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth signals broad-based economic expansion, which supports corporate sales and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive quarterly GDP growth prints are followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 50% of instances over a 5-year window.
